signals.headline: Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Ahead of 8 p
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Iran Ceasefire Ahead of 8 p.m. Deadline | YES | HIGH confidence**

President Trump has announced a **ceasefire agreement with Iran**, contingent on Iran opening the Strait of Hormuz.[1] This represents a significant de-escalation after days of escalating threats, including Trump's warning that "a whole civilization will die tonight" if a deal wasn't reached.[1]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?

signals.headline: Trump had threatened to strike Iranian civilian infrastructure—including bridges, power plants, and desalination plants—
signals.raw: Trump had threatened to strike Iranian civilian infrastructure—including bridges, power plants, and desalination plants—if Iran did not reopen the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran had closed and which handles approximately 20 percent of the world's oil supply.[1]

signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI inflation rises to 2.16% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's headline annual CPI inflation increased to 2.16% in March 2026 from 2.00% in February, with month-on-month inflation at 0.34%, as officially reported by Statistics Korea.[2]
